testcase.name: Customer Authorization Workflow › Verify user can create, submit and authorize a new customer record
Customer Authorization Workflow › Verify authorized customer record remains unchanged when edit operation is closed without saving
Customer Authorization Workflow › Verify authorized customer record can be edited, resubmitted and reauthorized successfully
Customer Authorization Workflow › Verify authorized customer record can be deactivated and displayed in deactivated queue
Customer Authorization Workflow › Verify authorized customer record can be edited, saved as draft and displayed in draft queue
